headline: How The CoStar Group (CSGP) Investment Story Is Shifting After Homescom And Activist Pressure
summary: CoStar Group’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly, with the price target moving from US$65.42 to US$64.89 per share. Analysts link this reset to a broader round of refreshed targets following Q4 results, updated 2026 and medium term guidance, and mixed views on the Homes.com investment case. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets fit into the evolving story around growth, risk, and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...
